---
title: "Flight Plan Report"
output: powerpoint_presentation
params:
  n: NA
  data: NA
  id_data: NA
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(fp)
library(ggplot2)
```

## Patient Flight Plan: `r params$n`

```{r plot, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
# Source the plot script if not already available
# In a real golem app, create_plot should be a function in the R/ directory
# but here it is in inst/app_code/plot_fp.r
source(system.file("app_code/plot_fp.r", package = "fp"))

if (!is.null(params$data) && !is.null(params$id_data)) {
  create_plot(id = params$n, data = params$data, id_data = params$id_data)
} else {
  ggplot() + 
    annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "Data not provided") + 
    theme_void()
}
```
